segments.text: I'm at the edit point now. The main thing I'm guarding is not leaving any shadow of the old plan conflict path behind in persistence or tests, because that would keep the broken model alive under different names.
I'm updating the plan persistence layer first because every other surface hangs off those signatures and columns. After that I'll swap the reconcile logic over to raw file-hash change detection.

The core reconcile logic is swapped now: file hash against stored file hash, no DB-changed branch, no conflict state. I'm moving through schema and migration next so the runtime and existing database shape match the new model.

items.text: Inspect current plan sync, persistence, schema, CLI lint, and affected tests
Refactor plan sync and persistence to remove bidirectional conflict state for plans
Update schema and migrations for the new plans table shape
Adjust read-model and CLI plan lint behavior
Update and add tests for single-master plan sync behavior
Run targeted tests, full suite, and final grep/schema verification

segments.text:
Implemented the handoff in the plan path.

The main changes are in murder/work/plans/sync.py:182, murder/state/persistence/plans.py:47, murder/state/persistence/schema.py:169, murder/state/persistence/migrations.py:404, murder/app/service/read_model.py:304, and murder/app/cli/service_cmd.py:404. Plans are now single-master: reconcile_file ingests from file hash only, there is no plan conflict branch, last_materialized_hash and conflict_reason are removed from plan persistence/schema, and the only DB→file write left is missing-file recovery via materialize_row. I also adjusted the plan scaffold call site in murder/ runtime/orchestration/orchestrator.py:832.

I added regression coverage in tests/unit/test_plan_sync_single_master.py:44 for real edits creating revisions, semantic no-op file rewrites not creating revisions, missing-file recovery, and legacy-schema migration. Existing plan tests were updated in tests/unit/test_plan_rename.py:43 and tests/unit/test_read_model_plan_display.py:30.

Verification:

- python -m pytest tests/unit/test_read_model_plan_display.py tests/unit/test_plan_rename.py tests/unit/test_plan_sync_single_master.py -q → 13 passed
- python -m pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke → 402 passed, 5 skipped
